user.title: Axuus
user.description: Choose how to authenticate with your Axuus account.

cookie.title: Axuus — Paste Cookie
cookie.description: Paste the .ASPXAUTH cookie value from your browser's developer tools.

reauth_confirm.title: Axuus — Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your Axuus session has expired. Choose how to re-authenticate.

error.captcha_required: Captcha required by Axuus. Please use the paste-cookie method instead.
error.invalid_cookie: The cookie is invalid or has expired.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Axuus. Please check your network connection.

abort.already_configured: This Axuus account is already configured.
